sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: IDS Finance - FacetsBCBSRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlCntl aborted due to Open Run Cycle
parameters.body:
The IDS Finance - Received Income Subsidy Detail processing cannot run while IDS "FINANCE" subject area is being updated/used by another process

Source Tables: Facets BCBS Finance ( CMS_ENR_PAYMT_DTL, CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT)
Target Table: IDS (RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL)
Subject : FINANCE
